description: CompositionWhite hooded sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has long raglan sleeves, adidas patented 3-Stripes in black on the shoulders and sleeves, shoulders and chest, snipped edges on the chest and hem, two insert pockets on the sides, distressed print on the back, brand label on the left hem, hood with tape drawstring and stitch detailing FittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separately at less than 40 degreesDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanWarm; do not iron on print/trims/logosGear up and upgrade your winter wardrobe with this hooded sweatshirt from adidas. Created from cotton fabric, this sweatshirt is sure to keep you warm and comfy, while you enjoy that hot street food on misty evenings. Layer it over a T-shirt and jeans, add on sports shoes and hit the streets this winter in style.Model statistics The model wears size M in sweatshirtsHeight: 6', Shoulders: 18"
